description: Consulting for engineering teams adopting LLMs. Architecture reviews, hands-on implementation, developer training. Built an AI portfolio agent (this site) as a showcase of agent capabilities.
highlights: Help companies assess where LLMs fit their product (and where they don't)
Architecture design + hands-on implementation to production
Train engineering teams to own and maintain AI systems independently
For larger projects, bring in QuantumSoft — a team worked with for 11 years

description: AI-powered "Chief of Staff" platform for automated meeting intelligence. Joined through acquisition — his LLM work at Performica triggered the deal. Shaped product end-to-end: AI agent pipelines, full-stack implementation.

Owned product direction for AI features — from concept to shipping
Joined after REKAP acquired Performica, selected as 1 of 2 engineers to transition
React + TypeScript frontend, Python/Django backend

description: People analytics platform. Led product vision for OrgGraph — organizational network analysis. His LLM integration work caught REKAP's attention and triggered the acquisition.

Rewrote entire product vision and user story flow from scratch
Began LLM integration — directly led to acquisition by REKAP

description: Computer vision and retail technology company. Built apps for shelf recognition and AR-powered shopping experiences.

description: Side project with a friend (ex-Rovio designer). Built Cops Inc. — a GTA-style open-world mobile action game with traffic simulation, drivable vehicles, and mission-based routing powered by Dijkstra and Octree algorithms.
highlights: GTA-style open-world game with traffic AI simulation
Dijkstra pathfinding + Octree spatial partitioning for mobile optimization
Co-founder is an ex-Rovio (Angry Birds) designer
